variants.title: Fleetguard FF5099 Fuel Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Donaldson P550567
variants.description: Fleetguard® FF5099 fuel filter cartridge reduces contamination, trapping dirt particles and preventing them from reaching the moving parts in your engine supporting longer service intervals.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985

variants.title: Donaldson P550567 Fuel Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550567 Fuel Cartridge is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: SAE J1985
